---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Swimming Pauls
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this solve? Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
How would this feature work? Be specific.

## Alternative Solutions
What other approaches have you considered?

## Use Case
Who would benefit from this and how?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.

## Would you contribute this?
- [ ] Yes, I'd be willing to implement this
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting
